Bio

Hi, I'm Abhi. I'm currently an Undergraduate Student at UC Irvine, studying Computer Science and Engineering. I'm interested in the intersection of machine learning, statistics, and cloud computing infrastructure, and I'm a big fan of embedded software and full stack development. If you'd like to chat, feel free to reach out on LinkedIn or at abhigyaa@uci.edu!
